title: Building Lights
description: A resource pack edited some of the light blocks for use in builds.
body:
Edits the light texture to be a solid color to be used in building projects![City build made with the resource pack and recommended shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/996f407ff4997d967ef45bef060baa536bad4ef3.png)
I recommend using [photon shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) for the best visuals

You are allowed to use this in videos as long as you 
credit me by putting the original resource pack link
in your video description. You may not edit or upload the resource pack myself without my permission

Share your creations with this resource pack on my [discord server
](https://discord.gg/5VEyZMN9xB)
